hooks.command: powershell -NonInteractive -Command "$changes = git -C 'C:\Users\ahmad\Documents\College\Projects\education-web-app' status --short 2>$null; if ($changes) { git -C 'C:\Users\ahmad\Documents\College\Projects\education-web-app' add -- . ':!.env.local' ':!*.env*' 2>$null; $files = (git -C 'C:\Users\ahmad\Documents\College\Projects\education-web-app' diff --cached --name-only 2>$null) -join ', '; if ($files) { $msg = 'chore: update ' + ($files.Split(',')[0].Trim()); git -C 'C:\Users\ahmad\Documents\College\Projects\education-web-app' commit -m $msg 2>$null; git -C 'C:\Users\ahmad\Documents\College\Projects\education-web-app' push origin HEAD 2>$null } }"
